videos.title: ATSX Saariselkä
videos.description: Downhill ice cross Finnish championships at Saariselkä 10.-11.2.2017, the event is even bigger this year! Come and see the best of the best of downhill ice cross skaters in Saariselkä at Red Bull Riders Cup 9.-10.2.2018!

videos.title: Ice Cross Downhill | Race in Saariselka, Finland | ATSX 500 | Round of 32
videos.description:
Cold Race on the Red Bull Ice Cross track in Saariselka, Lapland, Finland! 

Try to Follow the champ Scott Croxall.
It was a windy day, Be carefoul on the last jump buddy!

Heat final result:
1st: Scott Croxall, Canada
2nd: Kevin Sciboz, Swiss
3rd: Petri Kaarikainen, Finland
4th: Redlef Cornelis, Belgium

Let's go for the round of 16!

Topspeed up to 70 kmh

For more video: 
https://www.youtube.com/user/Scibozkevin 
https://www.Tiktok.com/@kevinsciboz 
http://www.instagram.com/Kevinsciboz 

#redbullicecross #icecrossdownhill #skate #extreme #fun #friends #austria #glide #ice #santa #Jump #dangerous #nevergiveup #follow #champ #worldchampionship #cold #funland

Teach by matt par

videos.title: 2019 Lapham Loppet XC Freestyle and Classical Ski Race
tags: 2019 Lapham Loppet XC Freestyle and Classical Ski Race
videos.transcript:
but the weather did make for a perfect
backdrop for a cross-country skiing race
today at Lapham park in Delafield it's
so fun to be on the snow the 2019 Lapham
Lobeck got a little help from Mother
Nature soft mushy bass have real snow
the Lapham peak loop is just more than a
mile long and usually relies on man-made
snow to keep skiers going but the fresh
powder can also have a downside but the
fresh snow is pretty nice but I was kind
of struggling on some of the hills there
the skiers weren't just gliding along
today they were racing for some it's a
test of endurance I'm usually really
excited for a race I enjoy racing to see
how far I can push myself for others
it's a case of sibling rivalry just got
to beat my sister
make sure the race also serves as a
fundraiser for the park hoping to add
another half mile of trail in the woods
it's been a lot of years of working on
it but it's a wonderful thing now that
we've got it all I hope to get started
on the edition of that in the fall if
they raise 160 thousand dollars so some
perfect weather for the skiers today
Jessie

videos.transcript:
skiers made their way over the hill and
across the trails at the 40th annual
Finlandia skiing event held at Buena
Vista Ski Resort North of Bemidji the
event saw over 100 participants go the
extra kilometer to celebrate this
Milestone here's this week's Northwoods
experience
[Music]
of different ages and experiences took
to the trails for the 40th Finlandia ski
event this past weekend there's a lot of
big ski marathons all over the state in
the Midwest and a lot of them haven't
been around nearly as long as the
Finlandia we've got a bunch of people
from Canada coming down some people from
the Twin Cities coming up Fargo but from
all over the place it's good to see that
the community support something like
this for 40 some years
whether it was for the first place
finish or just a personal best time
faces new and old looked to celebrate
this Milestone it just shows how much
the how much this race means to people
how much the organizers have put it put
effort into it every year it's an all
ages event it's a great chance to kind
of test your skills and it's got some of
the best prizes in all of cross-country
skiing well recognizing the
accomplishments of 40 Years of Finlandia
organizers managed to work around
challenges on and off the ski Trail
including the drop in participation
numbers races like this there's always
going to be fluctuations a couple of
years that are down couple years that
are high so participation has dropped
over the years only because you know
there's more and more races all around
the state today alone I think there's
five different races within the Midwest
here that people can choose from
members this year this year participants
who cross that finish line now look to
the Future for Finlandia in the future
we'd like to see the numbers go back up
again so you know if we could do you
know a little more cross you know a
promotion and things like that and
organize with other races and trying to
get their numbers back up but other than
that I mean we're really happy with the
way things turn out

videos.title: Jyväskylä Ski Marathon -reitillä (ensimmäinen puolikas)
videos.description:
Sarjassamme ...se edellä puuhun sain viimeinkin hiihdellyksi Jyväskylä Ski Marathon - reitin ensimmäisen puolikkaan läpi yhdellä rupeamalla. Toinen puolikas tuli hiihdellyksi jo vuosia sitten moneen kertaan. Synninpäästöksi saa kelvata se, että jouduin tässä tapauksessa hiihtelemään ensin lähtöpaikalle ja kakkospuolikkaassa edestakaisin.
 
Katso myös Marathon-reitin toinen puolikas https://youtu.be/t4gqcUptNYE

Metsoreitti, Keski-Suomen maakuntaura, hiihto, hiihtoretki, laturetki, retromusiikki, Laukaa, Jyväskylä,
Jyväskylä Ski Marathon, Ski Jyväskylä
